serviceNotes.engine oil: M156 6.2L AMG: shorter intervals (commonly 10,000 km / 12 months EU; track ~8,000 km).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: AMG M156: 45,000 km / 36 months (AMG high-output schedule; no auto-abc table for W211 E 63).
serviceNotes.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months (5-year time cap with long-life coolant).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: AMG SPEEDSHIFT: preventive ~60,000 km specialist practice.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: M156: monitor from ~80,000 km if idle issues.

serviceSources.engine oil: 10,000 km / 12 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (W211 E 63); https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7672-2002/service lists no intervals for comparable AMG page
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-AMG W211; chassis reference https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: 60,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (intake filter); no Tier 2 auto-abc row for W211 E 63 AMG
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W211 / AMG
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: 20,000 km — AMG brake inspection cadence (high-performance friction material)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 45,000 km / 36 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (spark plugs)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (engine coolant renewal)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: AMG SPEEDSHIFT / 722.9 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: LSD rear axle oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~100,000 km under sustained high load — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~80,000 km — AMG accessory drive preventive interval
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: M156 intake tract cleaning from ~80,000 km when idle or throttle symptoms — specialist practice
